center.name: Sempu (island)
center.summary: Sempu (island)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括爪哇鷹鵰，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its range in East Java includes Sempu Island, Bromo Tengger Semeru National Park, Meru Betiri National Park and Alas Purwo National Park

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Its range in East Java includes Sempu Island, Bromo Tengger Semeru National Park, Meru Betiri National Park and Alas Purwo National Park
